# Session 4 Log — 2026-05-20

The party split: half investigated the [[Phandalin]] docks while the others stayed in town. At the docks, the splinter group found a smuggling operation in [[Captain Marra]]'s warehouse and cleared it out. Marra promised them a favor in return.

In town, the rest spoke with [[Sera]], who is still worried that Gundren hasn't returned. The party regrouped at dusk and rode out to [[The Broken Mines]], arriving at the entrance just before the session ended. They camped at the entrance, intending to descend next time.
